# Copilot Instructions

## Project: Tech Intern Exam App

A game-like examination web app for programmer interns built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

### Features
- Multiple technology sections: HTML/CSS, JavaScript, Git, Databases, General Programming
- Game-like UI with timer, score tracking, and progress indicators
- Anti-cheat: no copy-paste, no screenshot/screen capture
- Multiple choice questions with instant feedback
- Final score summary with performance breakdown

### Stack
- Next.js (App Router, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS)
- React for UI components

### Checklist
